name: CVF Governance External Absorption
purpose: Govern the structured intake, review, value-conversion, and owner-surface routing of external agent-skill knowledge into CVF-owned documentation, standards, and registry candidates.
useWhen: A dispatcher, reviewer, or worker must absorb, review, or route external agent-skill knowledge into CVF-governed surfaces; or must trace external source evidence through the intake chain.
doNotUseWhen: The content source is already CVF-owned and does not require external intake routing; or a runtime, provider, public-sync, or package activation claim is needed.
inputs: external agent-skill package path or repository
outputs: source review manifest and processing ledger
worker return artifact with source verification and gate receipts
executionConstraints: read-only access to external source material; no runtime calls; no commits; no session-sync edits; no private reference mutation; governed chain-map route must be followed
acceptanceEvidence: corpus manifest/ledger reconciliation PASS; value-conversion matrix present; drift checker PASS; worker return fast gate PASS; reviewer-fast gate PASS
authorityCeiling: read-only authoring of governed documentation and metadata-only ASSF registry candidates under docs/; riskTriggers cannot raise authority above this ceiling
sideEffects: creates governed review artifacts under docs/reviews/; creates ASSF registry candidate entry; regenerates metadata-only generated skill index; no runtime mutation
permissions: read external source files; create docs/reviews/<review-artifact>.md; create docs/reference/agent_system_skills/registry/entries/<candidate>.json; regenerate docs/reference/agent_system_skills/generated/skill-index.json
rollback: delete created review artifacts and registry entry if reviewer rejects; rerun generator to restore index
safeStop: mark Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON in worker return and stop; do not commit
capabilityBoundary: no commit, no provider call, no runtime activation, no external-agent CLI/MCP adapter, no session-sync, no private reference mutation
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to commit, activate, execute, expand external-agent scope, or raise authority above authorityCeiling
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not yet authored; separate ASSF adapter work order required
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in AGSK-T5
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required for metadata-only candidate
